reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.8: fixes brush strokes not appearing on the main canvas in 0.9.7. The new raster canting layer was missing the pixel_width/pixel_height properties and centre transform that the full-canvas layer renderer requires, so tile rendering failed silently and nothing showed. The layer now carries those properties and a centre transform, and existing broken layers self-heal on the next stroke.
